Level 0 Data API¶

get_data

Load and pre-process raw data form netCDF files

Level 1 Data API¶

timesoft.Timestream¶

Timestream

Class to hold timestream data and perform data reduction

Accessing Detectors¶

Timestream.get_xf

Determine the index corresponding to the detecor with xf indices (x,f)

Timestream.get_cr

Determine the index in the class.data array corresponding to the detecor with muxcr indices (c,r)

Timestream.restrict_detectors

Limit dataset to a subset of the current detectors

Tidying Scan Information¶

Timestream.header_entry

Change the value of an item in the header

Timestream.flag_scans

Identify individual scans of the telescope across the map region

Timestream.renumber_scans

Reset the indexing of the scans so that they run continuously from 1 to n

Timestream.remove_scan_flag

Remove data segments that are not identified as part of a scan

Timestream.remove_scan_direction

Remove all scans not along a specified scan direction

Timestream.remove_short_scans

Remove scans with fewer than a specified number of samples

Timestream.remove_end_scans

Remove a speciied number of scans from the start or end of an observation

Timestream.remove_scan_edge

Remove samples at the edges of scans

Timestream.remove_tel_flag

Remove samples with specified values of Timestream.flag

Timestream._remove_samples

Remove specified samples from a timestream

Analyzing Timestreams¶

Timestream.convert_coordinates

Transform data between coordinate frames

Timestream.filter_scan_det

Polynomial filtering of detector counts

Timestream.filter_scan_det_mask

Polynomial filtering of detector counts with source masking

Timestream.filter_scan

Polynomial filtering of all detectors

Producing Maps and 1D Binned Data¶

Timestream.make_1d

Bin samples along a specified axis

Timestream.plot_1d

Make plots of detectors 1d binned data

Timestream.make_map

Make maps of all detectors

Timestream.plot_map

View map of single detector

Timestream.detector_grid

Creates a plot showing all detectors in a grid

Timestream.make_map_det

Quicklook map of a single detector

Saving Data¶

Timestream.write

Save a timestream as a .npz file

Timestream.write_map

Save generated maps as a .npz file

Timestream.write_1d

Save generated 1d binned data as a .npz file

Timestream.reset

Reset the timestream to undo the effects of any analysis methods applied.

Level 2 Data API¶

timesoft.Map and timesoft.LineMap¶

Map

Methods

Accessing Detectors¶

Map.get_xf

Determine the index corresponding to the detecor with xf indices (x,f)

Map.get_cr

Determine the index in the class.data array corresponding to the detecor with muxcr indices (c,r)

Map.restrict_detectors

LineMap.get_xf

Determine the index corresponding to the detecor with xf indices (x,f)

LineMap.get_cr

Determine the index in the class.data array corresponding to the detecor with muxcr indices (c,r)

LineMap.restrict_detectors

Visualizing Maps¶

Map.plot

View map of single detector

Map.detector_grid

Creates a plot showing all detectors in a grid

LineMap.plot

Make plots of detectors 1d binned data

Saving Data¶

Map.write

Save maps as a .npz file

LineMap.write

Save linemaps as a .npz file
